$schema_note: Custom schema, documented in README.md. Adapted from the Model Cards concept (Mitchell et al. 2019, 'Model Cards for Model Reporting', FAT*) -- normally used for ML classifiers -- to describe simulation-model interfaces: intended use, inputs, outputs, and units, so a tool or agent can load and interpret model output without reading source code.

models.full_name: Agent-Based Model of Iowa farmer crop-choice behavior
models.intended_use: Simulates individual farmer agents' land-allocation decisions (row crops vs. specialty/table crops) under varying social-network, extension-service, and policy-utility conditions. Output feeds into SWAT (land use -> hydrology) and LCA (crop mix -> life-cycle impacts).

key_fields.exp_id: integer experiment identifier (1, 2, 6, 11, 17, 27, 33, 41 map to named strategies; see pages/20_Agent_Based_Model.py for the name mapping)
key_fields.specialty-acres: acres allocated to specialty (table food) crops, model output, units: acres
key_fields.upper_bound_sa / lower_bound_sa: standard-deviation band on specialty-acres across replicate runs, units: acres

key_fields.exp_id: integer experiment identifier (1, 6, 11, 27, 41 map to the 5 co-simulation scenarios in metadata/scenarios.json)
key_fields.specialty-acres: acres allocated to specialty crops, units: acres

models.known_limitations: Multiple additional per-crop demographic/behavioral columns (e.g. *-g, *-d, *-p, *-j, *-m, *-w suffixes for grow/decide/persona/etc. sub-scores) exist in the pickles but are not currently visualized on the dashboard; see full column list via `pd.read_pickle(...).columns`.

models.intended_use: Simulates streamflow, sediment, and nutrient loading for the Des Moines-area watersheds (North/South Raccoon, North/South Skunk, Middle Des Moines, Lake Red Rock) under baseline and co-simulation land-use scenarios.

key_fields.MON: month index; renamed to 'Year' in the dashboard code
key_fields.FLOW_OUTcms: streamflow out of reach, units: cubic meters/second (cms)
key_fields.SED_OUTtons: sediment load out of reach, units: tons
key_fields.NO3_OUTkg: nitrate load out of reach, units: kg
key_fields.TOT Pkg: total phosphorus load out of reach, units: kg

key_fields.index: 4-letter SWAT crop code (e.g. CORN, SOYB, TOMA); see crop_codes dict in pages/45_Soil_and_Water_Assessment_Tool.py for the full code-to-name mapping
key_fields.columns: years 2020-2050, values are marketable crop yield

output_artifacts.granularity: per reach (RCH), per year (Year, renamed from MON)

models.full_name: Life Cycle Assessment of local food-system scenarios
models.intended_use: Quantifies energy use and global warming potential (GWP) associated with food production/consumption under baseline vs. increased-local-food scenarios, and under the 5 co-simulation scenarios. Reports IN-MSA generated impacts only (not displacement-inclusive against a full-import baseline; see Stone et al. 2023/2026 for the complementary displacement-inclusive framing).

output_artifacts.granularity: per year, per food-system scenario (fsscenario), per model combination (cosim)

key_fields.fsscenario: BASE (current ~5% local food) or LOCAL (increased ~50% local food)
key_fields.cosim: which models were combined to generate this row: LCA (LCA alone) or LCASWAT (LCA + SWAT coupled)
key_fields.gwp: global warming potential, units: kg CO2-eq
key_fields.luha, luhacrop, luhapasture: land use in hectares (total, cropland, pasture)

output_artifacts.note: pre-filtered/pre-shaped subsets of lca_dataset.csv for the BASE and LOCAL scenario respectively, used directly for plotting

key_fields.additional per-crop-category columns: land use by crop category (protein, dairy, fruit, vegetables, grains, oil, sugar, commodity), units: hectares
